title: Lesson 522: 次々, 就く, 土...

items.gloss: to take (seat, position, course, office, etc.); to assume; to be hired; to be employed; to ascend (the throne); to accede; to start (on a journey); to commence; to depart; to study (under teacher); to be an apprentice
Saturday; earth; dirt; soil; land; lands; ground; earth (third of the five elements)
continuation; rest (of the story, work, etc.); next instalment; sequel; flow (e.g. of a piece of writing); pacing (of a story); succession (of); sequence; series; spell; stretch; streak; run
bundle; package; parcel; counter for wrapped objects
